_meta.description: Datable lore events referenced across CP2077 shards and world history. Each event has a year (or range), era classification, source shards, and involved entities.

events.label: Arasaka founded
events.description: Saburo Arasaka founds Arasaka Corporation in Japan, initially as a security and manufacturing firm. It will grow into the most powerful megacorporation on Earth.

events.label: Night City founded
events.description: Richard Night begins construction of Coronado City (later renamed Night City) as a planned corporate utopia in California.

events.label: Richard Night assassinated
events.description: The founder of Night City is assassinated by corporate interests. The city is renamed Night City in his honour. Corporate control of the city deepens.

events.label: Cyberware mass adoption begins
events.description: Military-grade cyberware begins to proliferate into civilian markets. Ripperdocs emerge as underground surgeons. First cases of cyberpsychosis documented.

events.label: Samurai band formed
events.description: Johnny Silverhand forms Samurai with Kerry Eurodyne, Denny, and Henry. The band becomes a voice of anti-corporate resistance in Night City.

events.label: Latin American Wars
events.description: Militech and Petrochem fund and fight corporate-proxy wars across Latin America, displacing millions and creating the nomad populations that will form clans like the Aldecaldos.

events.label: MaxTac unit created
events.description: NCPD establishes MaxTac, its elite cyberpsycho response unit, as cyberpsychosis incidents become too frequent for standard police response.

events.label: Alt Cunningham captured by Arasaka
events.description: Arasaka kidnaps Alt Cunningham, the inventor of Soulkiller, to extract her neural pattern and weaponise the technology. Johnny Silverhand attempts a rescue that fails.

events.label: Samurai disbands
events.description: Samurai plays its last concert and officially disbands. Internal tensions and the corporate pressures on the music scene are cited. Kerry Eurodyne goes solo. Johnny becomes increasingly radicalised.

events.label: Rache Bartmoss releases DataKrash
events.description: The greatest netrunner in history releases a self-propagating data virus into the Old Net from his life-support pod. The Old Net collapses. The Blackwall is erected to contain rogue AIs. Netrunning changes forever.

events.label: Fourth Corporate War
events.description: Open warfare erupts between Arasaka and Militech, spilling into Night City streets. Corporate mercenaries fight pitched battles. The city becomes a warzone.

events.label: Arasaka Tower bombed
events.description: Johnny Silverhand, Morgan Blackhand, and a small team detonate a tactical nuke inside Arasaka Tower. Johnny is killed. The explosion devastates central Night City. Arasaka is temporarily expelled from North America.

events.label: Arvin Accords signed
events.description: In the aftermath of the Fourth Corporate War, the Arvin Accords are signed, theoretically limiting corporate military power. Enforcement is weak. Arasaka retains significant influence.

events.label: Reconstruction of Night City
events.description: Night City is rebuilt after the Arasaka Tower bombing. Corpo Plaza is reconstructed. The megabuilding housing model expands. Night Corp assumes more control of infrastructure.

events.label: Pacifica construction halted
events.description: The ambitious Pacifica coastal development project collapses when its corporate backers withdraw funding mid-construction. The district is abandoned and becomes a lawless zone.

events.label: Nomad Cookbook era
events.description: A period in nomad history when Aldecaldo clans developed extensive survival and foraging knowledge, documented in practical guides like the 2034 nomad cookbook.

events.label: Cyberpsychosis epidemic peaks
events.description: Cyberpsychosis cases reach epidemic levels in Night City. MaxTac is expanded. Regina Jones begins documenting cases journalistically. Debate rages about treatment versus elimination.

events.label: Arasaka returns to North America
events.description: Arasaka Corporation fully re-establishes itself in Night City, rebuilding Arasaka Tower and Corpo Plaza. The Arvin Accords are effectively dead letters.

events.label: Dogtown established under Hansen
events.description: Kurt Hansen seizes control of the EBM Petrochem Stadium area in Pacifica, creating the fortified zone known as Dogtown. Barghest is formed as his personal army.

events.label: Lizzy Wizzy's full chrome conversion
events.description: Pop star Lizzy Wizzy, following the murder of her manager Liam Nolan, undergoes a full-body chrome conversion — replacing all organic tissue with cybernetics. The event is covered globally.

events.label: Songbird recruited by FIA
events.description: A young netrunner of exceptional ability is recruited by the FIA and becomes known as Songbird, deployed as a deep-cover intelligence asset.

events.label: Voodoo Boys consolidate Pacifica
events.description: The Voodoo Boys complete their takeover of the West Wind Estate and Coastview districts in Pacifica, establishing a de-facto autonomous zone with access to the Blackwall.

events.label: All Foods scandal breaks
events.description: Investigative reports begin surfacing about All Foods processing facilities using human biomass in synthetic protein products. The corporation suppresses coverage effectively.

events.label: Events of Cyberpunk 2077
events.description: V arrives in Night City. The Heist goes wrong. Johnny Silverhand's engram is implanted. The main story of the game unfolds across all districts.

events.label: Phantom Liberty operation
events.description: NUSA President Myers' plane is shot down over Dogtown. Solomon Reed is activated. Songbird becomes the object of a desperate extraction operation.
